CustomField.description: Amount to be invoiced to the lessor 20150527 - CA EE Invoice amount need to be split between CA amount and LLP amount. Creating two new fields (CA and LLP Amounts) and converting this field to store the sum of both. Will use a WF to keep this field updated. Adding a new formula field pointing to this to show on the screen.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Amount to be invoiced to the lessor
CustomField.label: _Total Invoice Amount
